info.title: Hive CPQ Product Configurator
info.description: Hive CPQ is a comprehensive Configure Price Quote (CPQ) solution that empowers sales teams to generate accurate quotes for complex products. Streamline your sales process by seamlessly integrating Hive CPQ to automate workflows, sync data, and optimize your operations using our connector. Maximize efficiency and deliver exceptional sales experiences with Hive CPQ's powerful connector.

delete.description:
Removes an account from the account list of a distributor.

Some validation rules apply:

- This account may not be used in any project
- All contacts linked to this account must be removed before removing this account

post.summary: Generate the quote, calculation or order summary pdf for a project
post.description:
This endpoint generates a pdf of an output document for a certain project. Within HiveCPQ it is possible to first create an instance of an ouputput document template and attacht it to a project. Afterwards, it is possible to change that instance for the given project. This endpoint does NOT attach instances of the output document template to a project. This endpoint does NOT make any changes within the project. It only generates the pdf.

The preferred way to call this endpoint is either by passing the type of the document or the `outputDocumentTemplateId`. When the type is equal to "QUOTE", HiveCPQ will use the default quote template configured for the distributor attached to the project.

post.summary: Generate the quote, calculation or order summary word for a project
post.description:
This endpoint generates a word file of an output document for a certain project. Within HiveCPQ it is possible to first create an instance of an ouputput document template and attacht it to a project. Afterwards, it is possible to change that instance for the given project. This endpoint does NOT attach instances of the output document template to a project. This endpoint does NOT make any changes within the project. It only generates the file.

The preferred way to call this endpoint is either by passing the type of the document or the `outputDocumentTemplateId`. When the type is equal to "QUOTE", HiveCPQ will use the default quote template configured for the distributor attached to the project.

post.summary: Refresh the prices in running projects with those from master data
post.description:
All price changes that occur within the master data are not pushed into active running projects (step < 2). This endpoint refreshes the project prices with the master data. It is also possible to indicate if a recalculation of the project is required. This might be needed when prices are calculated on project level.
It is also possible to force a recalcuation of the prices of configurations in the active projects. This is similar to publishing a configurator with the same version number. However in this instance the service will publish all configurators at once witout upgrading them to a new version number.

Move a project segment to step 4
Cancel the order process and move a segment back to step 2
post.description: Cancel the order process and move a segment back to step 2

post.summary: Cancel the order process to quotation
post.description: Cancels the order process and move a segment back to quotation. Project segment must be in step 1 or step 2 in order to be moved to quotation.

post.summary: Cancel the order process to step 1
post.description: Cancels the order process and move a segment back to step 1. Project segment must be in step 2 in order to be moved to step 1.

post.summary: Change the settings of a project segment
post.description: This api allows the settings of a project segment tobe changes. At its heart, the project settings use a configurator to manage specific settings.
When a segment is recalculating and the environment has a RECALCULATION_REQUESTED webhook then this API can be used to continue the recalculation process.

404.description: Indicates the plugin token was not found. If this happens, the user should refresh the browser

get.description:
Plugin tokens are used to retrieve information about who is currently using the plugin from within HiveCPQ.

A user can be connected to multiple distributors at any given time. The plugin token will return a list of linked contacts for the user that logged in.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item that must be unique within the entire request. This is not the property ID.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item. It is not the feature ID.

featureGroupCode.description: Code of the feature group where feature should be upserted.

serialSearchFunction.description: Function that will be executed when searching for a serial number.

integratedSystemId.description: Optional integrated system ID used to create an integrated system link for this feature.

integratedSystemName.description: Optional integrated system name used to create integrated system links for your feature groups.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item. It is not the feature group ID.

integratedSystemId.description: Optional integrated system ID used to create an integrated system link for this feature group.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item. It is not the custom object ID.

resourceId.description: ID of the created or updated resource.

message.description: Message with additional information if the item failed to be handled.

successCount.description: The amount of successfully handled items.

integratedSystemName.description: Optional integrated system name used to create integrated system links for your categories.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item. It is not the category ID.

mainCategoryCode.description: Code of the parent category. This turns your new category into a sub-category.

integratedSystemId.description: Optional integrated system ID used to create an integrated system link for this category.

ConfigurationStatusEnum.description:
Status of the item. Can be
VALID: this item is without errors
ERROR: this item has an error in its configuration
UPGRADE or ACCEPT_UPGRADE: this item must be upgraded to a new configurator version

CompanyTypeEnum.description: The different types of companies in Hive.

ResponseCompanySubDistributorSettings.description: These settings are included for SUB DISTRIBUTOR companies.

CompanyInfo.description: The general info about a company.

websiteUrl.description: URL to the website of the company.

preferredLanguage.description: The default language for the company in ISO 639-1 format.

externalSystemId1.description: An ID used to identify the company in an external system. It is usually recommended to use a system link instead.

externalSystemId2.description: An ID used to identify the company in an external system. It is usually recommended to use a system link instead.

CompanyAdvanced.description: The advanced info about a company.

salesRepresentativeContactId.description: ID of a contact who functions as sales representative.

techSupportManagerContactId.description: ID of a contact who functions as technical support manager.

orderProcessingManagerContactId.description: ID of a contact who functions as order processing manager.

shippingManagerContactId.description: ID of a contact who functions as shipping support manager.

companySalesConditions.description: The conditions and defaults applied to projects of this company.

vatConditionCode.description: The default VAT condition code for projects of this company. Available codes are defined inside your Hive CPQ environment.

deliveryConditionCode.description: The default delivery condition code for projects of this company. Available codes are defined inside your Hive CPQ environment.

paymentConditionCode.description: The default payment condition code for projects of this company. Available codes are defined inside your Hive CPQ environment.

baseDiscount.description: The default discount for configurations in projects of this company.

orderCurrency.description: Default order currency of the company.

administrationFee.description: Administration fee applied to projects of this company.

fee.description: The fee applied if a project for this company does not reach the fee threshold.

threshold.description: The minimum price below which a fee will be applied.

CompanyProductStore.description: Product store settings of this company.

enabled.description: Allow this company to access the product store.

priceCatalogId.description: ID of the price catalog used for this company.

storeDiscountPercentage.description: The discount percentage applied to product store items in a project of this company.

CompanyDefaultProjectSettings.description: The default project settings of the company.

defaultVatConditionCode.description: The default VAT condition code for projects for this company. Available codes are defined inside your Hive CPQ environment.

defaultPaymentConditionCode.description: The default payment condition code for projects for this company. Available codes are defined inside your Hive CPQ environment.

salesPricingStrategy.description: The default pricing strategy for projects for this company.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Common address model for Hive based addresses

items.description: The external link allows integrators to link resources of external systems to resources within HiveCPQ. An integrated can link a "project" with a CRM. In this case the integratedSystemName would be "CRM" and integratedSystemId will be the id of the project in the CRM. This ExternalLink object will be attached to the "projects" resource.

integratedSystemName.description: Name of the integrated system e.g. "CRM"

integratedSystemId.description: ID of the resource as represented in the external system e.g. the project id within the CRM system.

createdAt.description: The moment the entities were linked in the external system. E.g. the HiveCPQ project was linked with the CRM at the createdAt timestamp.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating an updated occurred within the integration between HiveCPQ and the external system.

vatNumber.description: VAT number to be used for the INVOICE address.
VAT number to be used for the INVOICE address.

Invite.description: An invite represents an invitation to create a user within the Hive platform. Users can only be added through an invite.

ManufacturerContact.description: This is contact of a manufacturer. Each contact is linked to a specific company.

roles.description: Hive security roles linked to a contact

id.description: Unique Hive Id to identify this component

articleCode.description: Unique article code linked to this component.

scriptPrice.description: Javascript that will be executed when calculating the price of a component when a serial number has been entered.

showOnlyForSerialNumber.description: Only make this component visible in tthe product store when the serial number has been entered.

price.description: The 'listPrice' field should be used instead.

configurable.description: This block represents a component that is a template for a configuration. It is linked to a configurator and has initial input values that will be used to created the configuration.

Translations.description: A collection of translations. In most cases the EN-US translation will be available.

languageCode.description: The language code in ISO 639-1 format.

translation.description: The translated value corresponding to the languageCode

value.description: The value can be any of the common data types available to custom objects

Problem.title: Problem

status.description: Status of the problem, this is typically an http status code or an application error code

Problem.description: General error handling probles as described in https://docs.hivecpq.com/docs/error-handling

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item that must be unique within the entire request. This is not the component attachment ID.

articleCode.description: Article code of the existing component

isImage.description: Flag indicating whether the attachment is an image.

integratedSystemName.description: Optional integrated system name used to create integrated system links for your components.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item that must be unique within the entire request. This is not the component ID.

integratedSystemId.description: Optional integrated system ID used to create an integrated system link for this component

RequestPostComponentsBulkDelete.description: This controller allows you to pass two sets of component ids. The componentIDsNOTIn specifies the list of components that you want to keep after this request finishes. The componentIDsIN specifies the list of components you want to keep.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A project is the starting point for making configurations in Hive. A projects is build from a set of project segments. These segments resprent project segment items and their order status.

sellTo.description: Contact and/or Company the project will be sold to

invoice.description: Contact and/or Company the project will be invoiced to.

delivery.description: Contact and/or company that will be used for the delivery

installation.description: Contact and/or company used to installing the project

vatCondition.description: Vat condition used in the project. Field designated to be used by the person who is selling the project.

vatPercentage.description: Vat percentage used in the project. Field designated to be used by the person who is selling the project.

deliveryCondition.description: Delivery condition used for delivering the goods in the project e.g. Ex works. Field designated to be used by the person who is selling the project.

paymentCondition.description: Specific payment condtition used for paying the project. Field designated to be used by the person who is selling the project.

ProjectSegmentLink.title: ProjectSegmentLink
ProjectSegmentLink.description: The project segment link contains all the data relavant to link from a resourse to a project segment resource. E.g projects contain project segments

ProjectSegment.title: ProjectSegment
ProjectSegment.description: A project segment is a segment of a project that holds project segment items linked to one manufacturer. A project segment also functions as an order depending on the status.

id.description: External links referring to this segment

moveToStep1At.description: Timestamp the segment was moved to step1.

moveToStep2At.description: Timestamp the segment was moved to step2

moveToStep3At.description: Timestamp the segment was moved to step3

moveToStep4At.description: Timestamp the segment was moved to step4

orderRemark.description: Remarks that were made by the distributor.

orderRemarkFromManufacturer.description: Remarks that were made by the manufacturer.

shippingDateRequested.description: The requested shipping date by the distributor.

shippingDateConfirmed.description: The shipping date as confirmed by the manufacturer.

delivery.description: All information required to let the manufacturer make the delivery.

invoice.description: All information to allow the manufacturer make the invoice.

sellTo.description: Information indicating who this order will be sold to.

salesCondition.description: Specific sales conditions that are applicable when ordering.

ProjectSegmentItemType.description: Indicates if the item has a standard configurator or a product linked to it.

articleCode.description: Code of the product store article.

configuratorCode.description: Code of the configurable item configurator.

ProjectLink.title: ProjectLink
ProjectLink.description: The project link refers to a project resource that is linked to another entity. E.g a ProjectSegment can be linked to a Project using the ProjectLink.

Price.title: Price
Price.description: All prices withinn HiveCPQ. This entails the list price, purchase price, sales price and discount

listPrice.description: This is the public list price.

discount.description: The discount percentage a distributor receives on that list price.

purchasePrice.description: The price the distributor has to pay the manufacturer.

salesPrice.description: The price the distributor will sell to the end customer.

ContactLink.title: ContactLink
ContactLink.description: Link object used when referencing a contact from another entity.

href.description: Href for a contact will be /manufacturers/{manufacturerId}/contacts/{contactId}

fullName.description: First and last name of the contact

GetProjectsReponse.title: GetProjectsReponse
GetProjectsReponse.description: Response for the projects linked to a manufacturer.

CompanyLink.title: CompanyLink
CompanyLink.description: Small object used when referring a company that is linked to another entity.

ProjectSegmentItem.description: The project segment item represents one configuration/component inside the project segment. And item represents the raw value of what the distributor will order.

name.description: Name of the item. This can be altered by the user in the app.

sortingSequence.description: The position of the project segment item in its segment.

quantity.description: Number of these items that are ordered

externalSerialNumbers.description: Serial numbers linked to this item that have been generated from an external system. One item can have multiple serial numbers linked to the quantity field.

orderSerialNumber.description: The serial number that was entered in the product store when creating the item.

orderSerialNumberMatched.description: Indicates if the the item matches the serial number. True means the item can be ordered without manual intervention.

CreateInvite.description: Model that provides necessary data to create an invite

forContact.description: Contact that will be linked to the user claiming the invite.

contactId.description: Can be either contactId or integrated system id

fromContact.description: Contact that is responsible for sending the invite.

contactId.description: Can be hive contactId or integrated contact id.

enableSSO.description: When true, the user can automatically login via Single Sign On. This needs tobe configured within HiveCPQ. The user will not receive any invite e-mail and will just be able to sign in.

id.description: Hive id of the role. This is unique

Audit.title: Audit

createdAt.description: The timestamp the resource was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp the resource was updated

Audit.description: Audit fields allowing for tracking creates and updates on resources. Contains the contact that created or updated the resource together with the timestamp.

href.description: The url to the price catalog

name.description: name of the configurator in the default language

id.description: The uniqe hive id of the feature

name.description: The name in the default language.
Name of this component in the default language.

description.description: Discription of this component in the default language.

productGroup.description: The group of products this component belongs to.

showOnlyForSerialNumber.description: Only show this component when the serial number has been searched.

minimumQuantity.description: Minimum quantity that can be ordered of this component in the product store.

configurable.description: Is this component a blue print for a configuration?

id.description: The hive id of the component unit.

code.description: Refers to the code of a property. It must be present in the properties collection of a manufacturer

value.description: Single value when the property is not an array

arrayValues.description: Array of values when the property is of type array

code.description: Refers to the code of a property. It must be present in the properties collection of a manufacturer

value.description: Single value when the property is not an array

arrayValues.description: Array of values when the property is of type array

minimum.description: The minimum for this component quantity.

maximum.description: The optional maximum for this component quantity.

step.description: The step for this component quantity.

integratedSystemName.description: The name of the integrated system. E.g. Salesforce.

integratedSystemId.description: The id of the resource in the enternal system.
Id of the integrated system resource

UserAccount.title: UserAccount
UserAccount.description: A user account refers to the account the user recieves when connecting to Hive e.g. by claiming an invite. A user account can be linked to multiple manufacturers.

contacts.description: List of contacts lined to multiple manufacturers

lastActiveAt.description: When the user last logged in

companyId.description: The contact which is linked to a company

roleIds.description: Set of roles that are required for this contact. At least one role is required.
At least one role is required.

visibility.description: PUBLIC: can be used by manufacturer contacts and distributor contacts. RESTRICTED: can only be used by manufacturer users.

defaultRoleForManufacturerCompany.description: When true, this role will be taken when no role is specified upon creating a manufacturer contact. Note: this applies only via the HiveCPQ UI.

defaultRoleForDistributorCompanies.description: When true, this role will be taken when no role is specified upon creating a Distributor contact. Note: this applies only via the HiveCPQ UI.

companyId.description: The company this role is linked to.

price.description: Update any price related data on the item. To retain existing data you can omit the price block entirely.

unitCode.description: The unique code of a unit.

id.description: ID of the project segment attachment.

fileName.description: File name of the project segment attachment.

fileUrl.description: Publicly accessible URL of the project segment attachment.

distributorFile.description: Is the project segment attachment owned by the distributor.

items.description: A list of project segment attachments.

account.description: The account of the distributor to which the contact is linked.

accountId.description: This is the account id available in the address book of the distributor. This is not the distributor id. It is an optonal field. When not given, it will be displayed with all other contacts.

contactId.description: The ID of the contact who creates the project

name.description: The translated name of the category.

id.description: ID of the parent main category.

code.description: Code of the parent main category.
Unique code or id of the feature. Must be unique for the version, container and manufacturer

description.description: Description translated into the specific language.

serialSearchFunction.description: Function that will be executed when searching for a serial number.

code.description: Unique code or id of the feature. Must be unique for the version, container and manufacturer.

serialSearchFunction.description: Function that will be executed when searching for a serial number.
Function that will be executed when searching for a serial number.

description.description: Name as translated in the chosen language

serialSearchFunction.description: Function that will be executed when searching for a serial number.

newFeatureGroupId.description: The hive id of the new feature group.

unitCode.description: Code of the unit to use for this component quantity.

minimum.description: The minimum quantity to use for this component quantity.

maximum.description: The optional maximum quantity to use for this component quantity.

step.description: The step value to use for each incremental step for this component quantity. At the moment only a step of 1 is supported.

arrayValues.description: Specify a value array when the property is an array

id.description: The id of the integrated system link

integratedSystemName.description: The name of the integrated system

integratedSystemId.description: The id as known in the integrated system

hiveId.description: The hiveId as known in HiveCPQ

languageCodes.description: The available language codes for this template in ISO 639-1 format.

items.description: The language code in ISO 639-1 format.

type.description: The type of the document that must be generated

outputDocumentTemplateId.description: Generate a document corresponding to the output document template id

language.description: The document will be generated in the specified language. When not specified, "en" will be taken as the default

code.description: The unique code of the webhook

url.description: The url that will be invoked when calling the webhook

eventSubscriptions.description: Triggers the webhook upton firing of one of the events.

key.description: Unique key that will be added to the webhook

value.description: The value that will be added to the header

code.description: Unique code of the webhook trigger

configurationCode.description: Unique code from another configuration from which a new configuration will be created.

containerName.description: Optionally choose a container from which the configurator should be used.

version.description: Optionally choose a version from which the configurator should be used. This is the number of the version (e.g. 1.0.0) you want to access. Providing 'top' accesses the highest available version.

key.description: Key is used for legacy Configurations. Use uniqueLabel instead

RequestCompanySubDistributorSettings.description: Including these settings will turn the company into a SUB DISTRIBUTOR

distributorId.description: Id of the distributor company to which this company will be linked

integratedSystemName.description: Optional. Only target features linked to an integrated system.

featureCodes.description: A set of feature codes. To clear existing links specify an empty list.

integratedSystemName.description: Optional. Only target sub-categories linked to an integrated system.

categories.description: A set of sub-category codes. To clear existing links specify an empty list.

mainCategoryCode.description: Code of the main category for which sub categories must be linked to the the component.

subCategoryCodes.description: Sub-category codes under the main category to linked to the component.

integratedSystemName.description: Optional. Only target properties linked to an integrated system.

propertyValues.description: A set of property values. To clear existing values specify an empty list.

integratedSystemName.description: Optional. Only target units linked to an integrated system.

quantities.description: A set of quantities. To clear existing values specify an empty list.

ComponentExtensions.description: Manages links between the component and related Hive objects. Not including the extensions block will not modify existing relations.

itemId.description: A custom identifier of this item. It is not the component price ID.

componentCode.description: Code of the component to add the price(s) to.

unitCode.description: Code of the unit to use with the price.

priceCatalogName.description: Name of the price catalog to which the price belongs.

subDistributorPurchasePrice.description: Sub-distributor purchase price of the component.

companyName.description: The name of the linked company, useful for rendering filter dropdowns

updateProductStorePrices.description: Indicates if the system should update project prices of product store items with the latest available pricing information.

projectRecalculationRequired.description: Indicates if a recalcuation is required on project level. This will result in a forced recalculation status for all active projects (segment step < 2). Recalculation itself will not happen automatically, but must be triggered by the user.

updateConfiguratorPrices.description: Indicates if prices on a configurator level must be updated. This means that prices will be recalculated for all configurations in active projects. When the system finds a price change, it will ask the user for confirmation.

createdByContactId.description: This optional field can be used to specify who created the complaint. If this is not passed, HiveCPQ will automatically proviod it with the correct contact.

createdAt.description: When providing this optional field it must be according to the ISO-8601 standard: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

updatedByContactId.description: This optional field can be used to specify who last updated the complaint. If this is not passed, HiveCPQ will automatically proviod it with the correct contact.

updatedAt.description: When providing this optional field it must be according to the ISO-8601 standard: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

createdByContactId.description: This optional field can be used to specify who created the complaint. If this is not passed, HiveCPQ will automatically proviod it with the correct contact.

createdAt.description: When providing this optional field it must be according to the ISO-8601 standard: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

updatedByContactId.description: This optional field can be used to specify who last updated the complaint. If this is not passed, HiveCPQ will automatically proviod it with the correct contact.

updatedAt.description: When providing this optional field it must be according to the ISO-8601 standard: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

createdByContactId.description: This optional field can be used to specify who created the comment. If this is not passed, HiveCPQ will automatically proviod it with the correct contact.

createdAt.description: When providing this optional field it must be according to the ISO-8601 standard: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

updatedByContactId.description: This optional field can be used to specify who updated the comment. If this is not passed, HiveCPQ will automatically proviod it with the correct contact.

updatedAt.description: When providing this optional field it must be according to the ISO-8601 standard: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ

configurationCode.description: A unique code identifying this configuration.

ResponseConfigurationNodeComponentData.description: Additional data of the component attached to the node. By default this data is not included.

nodes.description: Child nodes of the parent node, this is a recursive structure. Nested nodes are not available for the DEFAULT output mode.

items.description: A collection of translated keys and values.

languageCode.description: The language code in ISO 639-1 format.

BasicIntegratedSystemLink.title: integratedSystemLink
BasicIntegratedSystemLink.description: A system link which will be added directly after creation of the resource that is being added

targetVersion.description: Version number (e.g. 1.0.0) you want to copy data to. Providing 'top' accesses the highest available version.

id.description: ID of the copied object in the target version.
